summary: Tested RetailPro POS Receipt Modal bug fix. Verified code changes in cart.tsx that move clearCart() from processCheckoutWithPayment to handleReceiptClose callback. UI testing confirmed full sales flow up to payment confirmation modal but could not complete final checkout due to session token expiration in automation. Code review confirms the fix is properly implemented.

integration_issues.issue: Unable to verify due to session expiration during automation - manual testing recommended

login_flow.details: Login with admin@fmcg.com / Admin@2025 works correctly

customer_selection_modal.details: Modal opens, shows +255 Tanzania prefix, phone search finds customer, Select button visible

products_grid.details: 8 products load with TSh currency, All/Test Category filter, product cards with + buttons

add_product_to_cart.details: Product added to cart, cart panel shows on right with item, quantity controls, subtotal/total

checkout_page.details: Checkout view shows customer, items, payment method options (Cash/Card/Mobile/Credit)

payment_modal.details: SalePaymentModal opens with order summary, payment method selection (Cash selected), Confirm button

receipt_modal_after_sale.status: CODE REVIEW PASS - MANUAL TEST REQUIRED
receipt_modal_after_sale.details: Code correctly implements: 1) clearCart() removed from processCheckoutWithPayment, 2) receiptData and showReceiptModal set after order creation, 3) handleReceiptClose calls clearCart() when modal closes, 4) Early return renders ReceiptModal before empty cart check

processCheckoutWithPayment.details: clearCart() is NOT called. Sets receiptData and showReceiptModal=true after order creation

handleReceiptClose.details: Properly calls clearCart() when receipt modal is closed

early_return_for_receipt_modal.details: Returns ReceiptModal component when showReceiptModal && receiptData are true, before empty cart check

features: Success header with checkmark and amount
Business info, items, totals, payment info, QR code

action_items: MANUAL TEST REQUIRED: Complete a sale manually to verify Receipt Modal appears after checkout
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix is correctly implemented - clearCart() deferred to handleReceiptClose callback
Early return at line 1250 ensures ReceiptModal renders before empty cart check
ReceiptModal and ThermalReceipt components are well-structured
No data-testid attributes on payment/receipt components - consider adding for automation

success_rate.frontend: 90% (all UI verified up to payment modal, Receipt Modal requires manual verification)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The bug fix for Receipt Modal is correctly implemented in cart.tsx. The code changes are: 1) clearCart() removed from processCheckoutWithPayment, 2) handleReceiptClose callback (line 1240-1245) now calls clearCart(), 3) Early return at line 1250 renders ReceiptModal before empty cart check. Session tokens expire quickly causing automation issues - manual testing recommended to verify complete flow. Products, customer selection, checkout, and payment modal all work correctly.
